positive: A stylized, whimsical forest scene viewed through a celestial portal. The main subject is a group of glowing, ethereal deer with geometric, bioluminescent markings, grazing among oversized, stylized flora. The plants feature vibrant jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasting against a deep indigo and midnight blue forest backdrop. The composition should use a central vignette, emphasizing the animals and flora silhouettes against a bright, star-dusted background. Style: Art Nouveau meeting vaporwave, high-contrast vector art, clean line work, flat graphic design elements. Lighting: Dramatic rim lighting, glowing elements emanating soft light. Print details: Designed for screen printing on apparel, ensuring clear, separated colors and strong outlines. Seamless texture suggestion.
negative: blurry, low contrast, photorealistic, gradient, text, watermark, logo, anime, cartoonish, messy, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, writing
